text: What happened to all the Tesla killers that legacy press and hedge fund short sellers predicted were coming? 🤔 https://t.co/rIi0jLJGey
summary: What happened to all the Tesla killers that legacy press and hedge fund short sellers predicted were coming? 🤔
ai_summary: Elon Musk questions the absence of predicted Tesla competitors despite years of industry forecasts from media and short sellers, highlighting Tesla's sustained competitive moat in electric vehicles. The post reflects on business strategy and market dynamics—specifically how Tesla has maintained dominance despite persistent predictions of disruption, offering operators a lesson in execution quality and the gap between competitive threats predicted by skeptics versus actual market outcomes.

text: Starlink provides global high-speed, low-latency Internet https://t.co/MCQ2DjiTvf
summary: Starlink provides global high-speed, low-latency Internet
ai_summary: Elon Musk posted a brief statement about Starlink's core value proposition: providing global high-speed, low-latency internet connectivity. While the thread lacks detailed discussion, this directly relates to Starlink's business positioning and product differentiation in the satellite internet market, highlighting the company's focus on performance metrics (speed and latency) as competitive advantages for global internet access.
